message:
feat(cx): integrate entropy source for deterministic randomness

Add comprehensive entropy source support to the Cx capability context,
enabling deterministic randomness for testing and reproducible execution:

cx.rs:
- Add entropy field to Cx struct storing Arc<dyn EntropySource>
- Update new(), new_with_observability() to accept optional entropy
- Add entropy() getter for raw entropy source access
- Add child_entropy() for deriving forked sources for child tasks
- Add random_u64(), random_bytes(), random_usize() convenience methods
- Add random_bool() for uniform boolean sampling

scope.rs:
- Thread entropy source through scope creation

lab/config.rs:
- Add entropy configuration support for test harness

net/tcp/listener.rs, stream.rs, udp.rs, unix/datagram.rs:
- Add entropy source integration for network operations requiring
  randomness (port selection, backoff jitter, etc.)

runtime/state.rs:
- Wire entropy through runtime state propagation

util/det_hash.rs:
- New module implementing deterministic hashing for replay scenarios

util/entropy.rs:
- Expand entropy source implementations with forking support
- Add OsEntropy default implementation using system RNG
- Add DeterministicEntropy for reproducible test scenarios
- Add EntropySource trait with fork() method for task isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
